name: Tuna Noodle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, thoroughly combine the soup, sherry, milk, parsley flakes, vegetables, and tuna.
2. Fold in the cooked noodles.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased crock pot.
4. Dot with butter or margarine.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours. (Cook noodles just until tender.)
